---
title: "Abstract"
unnumbered: true
---

This thesis examines an example research question to demonstrate the capabilities of the `uomthesis` Quarto template in *standard* format. The work develops a structured argument across six chapters, drawing on a mixed-methods approach.

Three principal contributions emerge. First, the analytical framework integrates two previously distinct literatures. Second, the empirical findings challenge a widely accepted assumption in the field. Third, the discussion offers practical implications for practitioners and policymakers.

The thesis conforms to the University of Manchester *Presentation of Theses Policy*. All findings are reproducible from the underlying data and code, which are made available alongside the submitted PDF.
